name: harness-skills
description: Closed-loop Harness Engineering workflows and scaffolding for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Install closed-loop Harness Engineering workflows for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Harness Skills turns Harness Engineering into a Codex plugin with project-local gates, workflow skills, scaffold templates, run records, review, verification, and feedback loops.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use agent-harness to initialize a closed-loop project harness.
